candidates.why: This is an explicit COGS-related D&A component, but it appears to be a sub-component of the already selected parent row 'Cost of goods solds' rather than an external same-level add-on. In the first period, 'Cost of goods solds' matches the broader COGS total and is consistent with being composed of balancing value plus depreciation/right-of-use components.

This is also an explicit COGS-related D&A component, but for the visible periods it appears to roll into the selected 'Cost of goods solds' amount rather than sit outside it. For example, 'Cost of Goods and Services Sold' plus this row approximates the selected COGS total.

variables.notes: Do not add separate COGS D&A. The selected COGS row 'Cost of goods solds' appears to be a parent/total that already includes the visible COGS depreciation/amortization components, so adding them would double count.

candidates.why: This is the only explicit SG&A-related D&A row above operating profit, but its visible values are zero/blank and it appears as a separate line that contributes nothing material to add later.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A D&A should be added. Although an explicit 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' row exists above operating profit, it is zero/blank in the preview, so there is no separate D&A amount to extract and add.
